label: Coronary Artery Disease
description: CAD, ACS, MI, PCI, CABG, stable angina, atherosclerosis
condition_query: coronary artery disease OR myocardial infarction OR acute coronary syndrome OR angina OR percutaneous coronary intervention OR coronary artery bypass

priors.comment: ~40% base success rate for CAD trials (lower than HF due to harder endpoints)
